projects.title: Student Grade Analyzer
projects.description: Create an R script to summarize student performance, calculate averages, and identify top performers using data frames.

projects.title: Global CO2 Emissions Explorer
projects.description: Analyze a real-world dataset of CO2 emissions to find trends over time and compare different countries using dplyr and ggplot2.

projects.title: Stock Market Trend Dashboard
projects.description: Develop a comprehensive analysis of stock price data, including moving averages and visual trend indicators.
